mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.seller_id AS sellerId, i.title, i.price, i.cover, i.view_count AS viewCount, i.want_count AS wantCount, i.create_time AS createTime, i.is_free_shipping AS isFreeShipping, i.shipping_fee AS shippingFee, i.status, i.audit_status AS auditStatus, i.is_deleted AS isDeleted, u.credit_score AS sellerCreditScore FROM item i LEFT JOIN user u ON i.seller_id = u.id WHERE i.status = 1 AND i.audit_status = 1 AND i.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY i.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
